concept: Players sort tangled yarn strands by color into designated spools or containers by tapping a source spool and then an empty or compatible destination spool, with the game responding by animating the yarn transfer. The core rule is that yarn can only be moved onto an empty spool or on top of yarn of the same color, with limited capacity per spool, and the goal is to sort all colors perfectly to complete a level.
name: Wool Craze -Yarn Color Sort 3D
